successCriteria.description: src/modules/balance/balance.model.ts exists and exports LeaveBalance, CreateLeaveBalanceDto, UpdateLeaveBalanceDto, and ILeaveBalanceRepository interfaces
src/modules/balance/balance.repository.ts exists and exports LeaveBalanceRepository class implementing ILeaveBalanceRepository
LeaveBalanceRepository methods use the PostgreSQL pool from src/shared/db/connection.ts
All repository methods include proper error handling with try-catch blocks and throw descriptive Error objects
tests/unit/modules/balance/balance.repository.test.ts exists with Vitest tests covering all repository methods (create, findById, findByEmployeeAndPolicy, findByEmployee, update, delete)

constraints: Repository pattern: All database access goes through repository interfaces
Input validation: Validate all inputs at API boundaries before processing
No sensitive data in logs: Never log passwords, tokens, PII, or financial data
Error handling: No unhandled promise rejections. All async errors are caught and handled
Dependency direction: leave -> balance (balance module cannot depend on leave module)
outOfScope: Any functionality outside the balance module domain models and repository
